experiment_7.Task: Run a Galaxy metagenomics gene-catalog pipeline with assembly and annotation on paired-end reads.
experiment_7.Prompt: I have paired-end metagenomic reads and want to use Galaxy to assemble contigs and annotate genes, but I am not sure which pipeline to use. Please choose a suitable Galaxy metagenomics gene-catalog workflow, run it, and for reproducibility report the assembly tool, the functional annotation tool, and the total number of tool steps in the workflow you actually ran.
